Appointment System and Process

Appointment System and Process

The Kadir Has University Psychological Counseling and Guidance Center provides services through an

appointment-based system

. Our primary principle is to respond to all applications promptly
      and to offer equal access to services for all students.

1

University students may request an appointment by clicking on the

“PDR”

tab on the main page of the MyKHAS application
            and completing the relevant form.

2

Initiation of the Process

Once your request is received, one of our professionals will contact you for a brief

phone screening interview

. Following this interview,
            your

first counseling session

will be scheduled.

3

Fees

All psychological counseling services are provided

free of charge

to Kadir Has University students.

4

Session Format and Duration

Sessions are conducted

face-to-face

or online via

Microsoft Teams

. The individual counseling process lasts

8 weeks

, with each session scheduled for

50 minutes

.

Cancellation Policy

If you are unable to attend your appointment, you are expected to notify us

at least 24 hours in advance

.

Attendance Policy

For unexcused absences other than official holidays, the counseling process will be terminated for individuals who fail to attend

two consecutive appointments

.
    Students are allowed to miss up to

two sessions

.
    For each absence exceeding this limit, the student's total number of sessions will be reduced by the number of missed sessions.

Psychological Counseling and Guidance Center
